read-update-pdf-metadata.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata with PdfFileInfo
read-update-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file, read its metadata (title, author, page count, version), modify the title and author, and save the changes to a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

read-pdf-author-metadata.title: Read PDF Author Metadata with PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, retrieve the Author metadata property, and output it to the console.

read-pdf-title-metadata-and-log.title: Read PDF Title Metadata and Log It
read-pdf-title-metadata-and-log.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read the Title metadata from a PDF file and append the value to a log file.

retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Retrieve PDF Keywords Metadata using PdfFileInfo
retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, read the Keywords metadata property, and display its value or indicate if it is not set.

read-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Read PDF Creator Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and retrieve the Creator metadata property.

read-pdf-modification-date.title: Read and Format PDF Modification Date using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-modification-date.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the ModDate metadata from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, parse the PDF date string, handle timezone formatting, and output a readable date.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Author property of a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the changes to a new document.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Title property of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the changes to a new file.

set-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Set PDF Keywords Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to assign keyword metadata to a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, save the changes to a new document, and verify the value after saving.

set-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to assign a custom Creator value to a PDF's metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the changes to a new PDF file.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF using PdfFileInfo
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata entry (ProjectCode) to an existing PDF file and save the updated document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo facade.

retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-projectcode.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata (ProjectCode)
retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-projectcode.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read a custom metadata entry named "ProjectCode" from a PDF file and display its value.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF Using PdfFileInfo Facade
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata field to a PDF document with the PdfFileInfo facade and persist the changes to a new file.

retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata 'ReviewedBy' Using PdfFileInfo
retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.description: The example checks for a PDF file, opens it with PdfFileInfo, and reads the custom metadata property 'ReviewedBy' using GetMetaInfo, logging the result.

add-custom-metadata.title: Add Custom Metadata to Multiple PDFs
add-custom-metadata.description: Creates sample PDFs, loops through them, adds a custom 'Department' metadata field using PdfFileInfo.SetMetaInfo, and saves the updated files.

update-pdf-metadata-version.title: Update PDF Metadata with Version Field
update-pdf-metadata-version.description: Demonstrates how to add or update a custom metadata entry (Version) in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade while preserving other metadata, and save the result to a new file.

remove-obsolete-metadata-field.title: Remove Obsolete Metadata Field from PDF
remove-obsolete-metadata-field.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfFileInfo, clear a custom metadata entry by setting it to an empty value, and save the updated document.

check-custom-pdf-metadata-key.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata Safely
check-custom-pdf-metadata-key.description: Demonstrates how to verify the existence of a custom metadata entry ("Confidential") in a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and safely read its value.

add-custom-timestamp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Timestamp Metadata to PDF
add-custom-timestamp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to set a custom metadata field containing the current UTC timestamp using PdfFileInfo and save the updated PDF file.

update-pdf-metadata-using-pdffileinfo.title: Update PDF Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-metadata-using-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, modify its metadata fields such as title, author, subject, keywords, and modification date, and save the changes to a new file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

dispose-pdffileinfo-and-document-add-tex.title: Dispose PdfFileInfo and Document with Using Blocks and Add Text Stamp
dispose-pdffileinfo-and-document-add-tex.description: Demonstrates using `using` blocks to properly dispose `PdfFileInfo` and `Document` objects, retrieve the page count, add a centered text stamp to the first page, and save the modified PDF.

backup-pdfs-update-metadata.title: Backup PDFs and Update Metadata with PdfFileInfo
backup-pdfs-update-metadata.description: Creates a backup copy of each PDF in a specified folder and then modifies its metadata (title, author, subject, keywords) using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo class.

audit-pdf-metadata-to-csv.title: Audit PDF Metadata Changes and Log to CSV
audit-pdf-metadata-to-csv.description: The example reads a PDF's original metadata with PdfFileInfo, updates several fields, saves a new PDF, and writes both original and updated values to a CSV file for auditing.

handle-readonly-when-saving-pdf-metadata.title: Handle Read‑Only File Attribute When Saving PDF Metadata
handle-readonly-when-saving-pdf-metadata.description: Shows how to modify PDF metadata with PdfFileInfo and gracefully recover from an IOException caused by a read‑only target file by clearing the attribute and retrying the save.

update-pdf-metadata-using-memorystream.title: Update PDF Metadata Using MemoryStream and PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-metadata-using-memorystream.description: The example loads a PDF into a MemoryStream, modifies its title, author, subject, and keywords via the PdfFileInfo facade, and saves the updated document to a new file.

update-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Update PDF Keywords Metadata Using PdfFileInfo Stream
update-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF from a file stream with PdfFileInfo, modify the Keywords metadata, and save the updated document to a new file.

conditionally-update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Conditionally Update PDF Author Metadata
conditionally-update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to read a PDF's Author field with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, set it only when the field is empty, and save the updated metadata to a new file.

list-custom-pdf-metadata-alphabetically.title: List Custom PDF Metadata Alphabetically
list-custom-pdf-metadata-alphabetically.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve all custom metadata keys from a PDF using the PdfFileInfo facade, sort them alphabetically, and display each key‑value pair.

merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdf-fileinfo.title: Merge XMP Metadata with PDF FileInfo
merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdf-fileinfo.description: Shows how to update standard PDF file information (title, author, etc.) and merge those changes with any existing XMP metadata packet using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-version-using-aspose-pdf.title: Read PDF Version Using Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-version-using-aspose-pdf.description: Shows how to retrieve the PDF version string from a file by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

export-pdf-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-metadata-to-json.description: Shows how to read metadata from each PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and serialize the collected information into a JSON file for external processing.

import-json-metadata-into-pdfs.title: Import JSON Metadata into PDFs using PdfFileInfo
import-json-metadata-into-pdfs.description: Shows how to read a JSON file of metadata, apply both standard and custom properties to PDF files with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, and save the updated PDFs.

apply-metadata-parallel-pdf.title: Apply Metadata Changes to Multiple PDFs in Parallel
apply-metadata-parallel-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to set title, author, subject, and keywords on several PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library.

thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Metadata Update with PdfFileInfo
thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.description: Demonstrates updating PDF metadata safely in parallel by giving each thread its own Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo instance.

validate-set-pdf-metadata-with-regex.title: Validate and Set PDF Metadata with Regex using PdfFileInfo
validate-set-pdf-metadata-with-regex.description: Demonstrates how to validate title, author, and custom metadata values against a regular expression before assigning them to a PDF via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, and then saving the updated document.

read-pdf-metadata-null-handling.title: Read PDF Metadata with Null Handling using Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-metadata-null-handling.description: Demonstrates how to read standard and custom PDF metadata using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade and gracefully handle null or empty values.

update-pdf-subject-metadata.title: Update PDF Subject Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-subject-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Subject field of a PDF's metadata with the PdfFileInfo facade and save the updated document to a new file.

set-pdf-language-property.title: Set PDF Language Property via PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-language-property.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfFileInfo, set the document language to "en-US" using the TaggedContent API, and save the updated file.

set-pdfa-compliance-update-metadata.title: Set PDF/A Compliance and Update Metadata
set-pdfa-compliance-update-metadata.description: The example converts a PDF to PDF/A‑1B, verifies the compliance flag, and then uses the PdfFileInfo facade to modify document metadata while preserving PDF/A compliance.

set-custom-document-id-pdf.title: Set Custom Document ID in PDF using PdfFileInfo
set-custom-document-id-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a GUID and store it as a custom metadata field in a PDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo class.
